---
title: "Royal Victoria Hospital, Netley, The"
---

## Royal Victoria Hospital, Netley, The

**Type:** organization

### About

This was a military hospital founded in 1856. Its first governor was CMY’s friend Colonel [[person:1515]Richard Wilbraham].  It survived until 1978 and is now a country park.

See http://www3.hants.gov.uk/hampshire-countryside/rvcp/history-rvcp.htm 
and  Anne Summers, [[otherbook:580]\'Ministering angels\'].

### Letters Mentioning This Organization


---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
